channel.title: Career Playbooks on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Career Playbooks on simeononsecurity

item.title: Education and Certifications for Software Developers
item.category: "software developer education" , "coding bootcamp vs degree" , "developer certifications" , "computer science degree" , "self-taught developer"
item.description: Compare degrees, bootcamps, self-teaching, and developer certifications to find the education path that fits your goals and budget.

item.title: Getting a Job as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer job search" , "developer resume tips" , "software engineer interview prep" , "coding interview" , "entry level developer jobs" , "remote developer jobs"
item.description: Practical strategies for landing your first or next software development role — resume writing, interview prep, coding challenges, and where to find developer jobs.

item.title: Getting Started in Software Development
item.category: "getting started in software development" , "learn to code" , "programming career beginner" , "software developer entry point" , "how to become a software developer"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin a software development career, from choosing your first programming language to understanding specializations and career paths.

item.title: Growing as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer career growth" , "junior to senior developer" , "open source contributions" , "system design" , "software engineering advancement" , "developer career track"
item.description: How to advance from junior to senior developer, choose your technical track, contribute to open source, and develop system design skills.

item.title: Managing a Development Team
item.category: "engineering management" , "managing developers" , "software team leadership" , "agile scrum kanban" , "devops for developers" , "engineering manager career"
item.description: How to transition into engineering management, build and lead development teams, run agile processes, and handle platform engineering responsibilities.

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineer career" , "software developer career guide" , "programming career" , "developer career path" , "coding career" , "software engineering jobs"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to starting, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.
